questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing employee sentiment about Rush as a workplace.
questions.introLine: Overall, how do you feel about Rush as a place to work?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing employee confidence in the organisation's future direction.
questions.introLine: How positive or negative do you feel about Rush's direction over the next 1–2 years?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing whether employees feel valued within the organisation.
questions.introLine: How valued do you feel as an employee at Rush?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing feedback about Rush's diversity and inclusion hiring initiative.
questions.introLine: How do you feel about Rush encouraging employees to introduce candidates from diverse cultures and groups?

questions.systemPrompt: You are evaluating whether employees believe the diversity initiative is effective.
questions.introLine: Do you believe this initiative is having a meaningful impact on the diversity of our hiring pool?

questions.systemPrompt: You are identifying what Rush has done well regarding diversity and inclusion.
questions.introLine: What has Rush done well so far in supporting diversity and inclusion?

questions.systemPrompt: You are collecting suggestions for improving the diversity and inclusion initiative.
questions.introLine: What could Rush improve or do differently to make this initiative more effective?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing perceptions of inclusiveness within organisational culture.
questions.introLine: How inclusive do you feel the culture at Rush is for people from different backgrounds?

questions.systemPrompt: You are evaluating psychological safety and openness within teams.
questions.introLine: Do you feel comfortable sharing your ideas and perspectives within your team?

questions.systemPrompt: You are evaluating leadership commitment to diversity and inclusion.
questions.introLine: How well do you think leadership demonstrates commitment to diversity and inclusion?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing employee satisfaction with compensation and benefits.
questions.introLine: How satisfied are you with your current remuneration and benefits at Rush?

questions.systemPrompt: You are evaluating employee perceptions of market competitiveness of compensation.
questions.introLine: Do you feel your compensation is competitive compared to similar roles in the industry?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing employee perceptions of career growth opportunities.
questions.introLine: How satisfied are you with your opportunities for career growth and development within Rush?

questions.systemPrompt: You are analysing whether employees believe performance is recognised fairly.
questions.introLine: Do you feel the organisation recognises and rewards good performance fairly?

questions.systemPrompt: You are evaluating employee advocacy and likelihood to recommend the workplace.
questions.introLine: How likely are you to recommend Rush as a place to work?

questions.systemPrompt: You are identifying the most impactful improvement the organisation could make for employees.
questions.introLine: What is the main thing Rush could improve to make your employee experience better?
